title: The Akshat Protocol

content:
The Akshat Protocol
From Imagination to Intelligent Systems.
The Akshat Protocol is my personal innovation portfolio focused on Artificial Intelligence, IoT, Automation, Embedded Systems, and Smart Technology.
I am Akshat Bhatt, an AI developer and technology enthusiast passionate about building intelligent systems that combine software, hardware, and automation to solve real-world problems.
What started as curiosity through science experiments, electronics, coding, and problem-solving gradually evolved into developing complete working systems powered by AI, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and IoT integration.
Rather than creating isolated prototypes, I focus on building end-to-end systems that are functional, practical, and continuously evolving through experimentation and innovation.
What I Build
Smart Home & IoT Integration Systems AI-Powered Smart Store Automation Intelligent Security & Monitoring Systems Predictive Analytics & Forecasting Models Computer Vision & Detection Systems Embedded Automation Projects Smart Infrastructure Concepts AI & Machine Learning Applications Featured Projects
Smart Store Automation System
A complete AI-powered retail automation system integrating object detection, face recognition, weight sensor fusion, automated cart tracking, and auto billing for a seamless cashier-less shopping experience.
Smart Home & IoT Automation
Developed multiple IoT-integrated automation systems including smart door lock control, remote access systems, sensor-based automation, and intelligent monitoring solutions using ESP8266 and cloud integration.
Gold Price Prediction System
Built a predictive analytics system using Machine Learning and Deep Learning models such as Random Forest, XGBoost, ARIMA, and LSTM to forecast gold prices with high accuracy.
Stock Market Prediction
Designed machine learning-based forecasting systems for analyzing stock market trends and time-series data.
Weapon Detection System
Developed a computer vision-based security system capable of detecting weapons using deep learning and image-processing techniques.
Human Brain CNN Project
Worked on CNN-based deep learning models involving human brain-related data analysis and neural network experimentation.
Technologies & Skills
Python Machine Learning & Deep Learning Computer Vision IoT & Embedded Systems ESP8266 & Sensor Integration Data Analytics Automation Systems Raspberry PI Jupyter Notebook & VS Code I believe innovation begins with imagination and becomes reality through engineering, experimentation, and persistence.
The Akshat Protocol represents my journey of transforming ideas into intelligent systems that think, adapt, automate, and evolve.
— Akshat Bhatt AI Developer • Builder • Innovator

title: About

content:
I’m an AI & ML engineering student building real-world intelligent systems that combine Artificial Intelligence, IoT, Embedded Systems, and Computer Vision.
🛒 Smart Autonomous Retail Store AI · Computer Vision · IoT · Smart Retail
A fully automated AI-powered retail system that eliminates traditional billing counters. Tracks customers via face recognition, detects product pickups using object detection, and performs automatic billing on exit — all in real time.
Face recognition + real-time person tracking Object detection for product pickup events Weight sensor fusion via HX711 Automatic virtual cart + checkout system Theft reduction via multi-sensor validation Python OpenCV CNN ESP8266 Arduino HX711
GitHub →
🔐 Smart IoT Door Lock System IoT · Embedded Systems · Smart Home
Complete IoT-based smart door lock using ESP8266 with mobile control, SinricPro cloud integration, auto-lock timer, PIR motion detection, and local manual override.
Remote lock/unlock via mobile Auto-lock timer + motion-based triggers Motor protection timeout Full power isolation management NodeMCU ESP8266 L293D PIR Sensor SinricPro Arduino
🔐 Smart Home Automation IoT · Embedded Systems · Smart Home
Complete IoT-based smart Fans and Lights using ESP8266 with mobile control, SinricPro cloud integration, auto-lock timer, PIR motion detection, and local manual override.
Remote ON/OFF via mobile Auto-ON/OFF timer + motion-based triggers Full power isolation management NodeMCU ESP8266 L293D PIR Sensor SinricPro Arduino Relays
🏦 RetainIQ — Customer Retention Intelligence System ML · RAG · AI · Banking · Churn Prediction
An end-to-end Customer Retention Intelligence System built for banking institutions. Predicts whether a customer will churn, assigns a risk category, and surfaces actionable countermeasures powered by AI with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
The system ingests 97 features across 8 behavioral and demographic categories, produces a churn probability score per customer, and enables retention teams to act with precision — not guesswork.
97-feature ingestion across behavioral & demographic categories Churn probability scoring per customer Automated risk category assignment AI-powered countermeasures via RAG Built for real banking retention workflows Python Machine Learning RAG AI API Predictive Analytics Banking
GitHub →
👤 Face Recognition System — InsightFace + ONNX Computer Vision · Edge AI · Embedded Systems
A face recognition system built using InsightFace for high-accuracy face detection and embedding generation. Explored real-world edge deployment by attempting to run the model on a Raspberry Pi using ONNX Runtime — hit hardware limitations but gained deep insight into edge AI constraints and optimization challenges.
High-accuracy face detection & recognition via InsightFace ONNX model export for runtime-agnostic deployment Raspberry Pi deployment attempted — ran into memory & compute limits Learned real-world edge AI tradeoffs: model size vs inference speed vs hardware 💡 Didn’t fully work on Pi — but that’s where the real engineering lessons were.
Python InsightFace ONNX Runtime Raspberry Pi Computer Vision Edge AI
GitHub →
📈 Gold Price Prediction System Machine Learning · Financial Forecasting
ML + Deep Learning system predicting gold prices using historical financial data. Compared 7 algorithms — Random Forest and XGBoost achieved 99%+ accuracy.
Time-series forecasting with ARIMA & LSTM Statistical stationarity testing Comparative model analysis across 7 algorithms Python XGBoost LSTM ARIMA Scikit-learn
GitHub →
📊 Stock Market Price Prediction Machine Learning · Financial Analytics
Predictive analytics system for stock market trend forecasting using regression-based ML models. Focused on analyzing historical price behavior across multiple algorithms.
Python Random Forest Gradient Boosting Pandas Matplotlib
GitHub →
👕 Clothing Recognition — CNN on Fashion MNIST Deep Learning · Computer Vision · CNN
Built a Convolutional Neural Network from scratch to classify clothing items using the built-in Fashion MNIST dataset. A foundational deep learning project focused on understanding CNN architecture, feature extraction, and image classification pipelines.
Trained on 70,000 images across 10 clothing categories Built and tuned CNN layers from scratch Learned conv layers, pooling, dropout, and softmax classification Python TensorFlow/Keras CNN Fashion MNIST
GitHub →
📝 Text Summarization NLP · Deep Learning · Text Processing
Explored automatic text summarization techniques as part of learning NLP fundamentals. Focused on understanding how models condense large text into meaningful summaries.
Studied extractive vs abstractive summarization approaches Built summarization pipelines on sample text datasets Foundation for future NLP and AI assistant work Python NLP Deep Learning Text Processing
GitHub →
🤖 AIVA — Personal AI Assistant AI · NLP · Voice Systems
A modular personal AI assistant designed to evolve into a full intelligent ecosystem — voice interaction, NLP understanding, smart device control, and memory systems.
Planned phases: Wake-word detection → Speech-to-text → NLP intent → Memory systems → Robotics integration
Python Neural Networks NLP Speech Processing
🔫 Weapon Detection System Computer Vision · AI Security
Deep learning-based surveillance system for real-time weapon detection in video feeds. Designed for smart security infrastructure and public safety applications.
Python OpenCV CNN Deep Learning
GitHub →
📚 ML Algorithm Implementation Series Machine Learning Fundamentals
A collection of standalone ML implementations built in Jupyter Notebook — Linear Regression, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, and KNN with full evaluation pipelines.
Python Scikit-learn Pandas NumPy Jupyter
GitHub →
⚙️ Technical Skills Domain Skills Languages Python, Embedded C, Arduino AI / ML Deep Learning, CNN, Computer Vision, Time-Series, Predictive Analytics Libraries TensorFlow, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, Pandas, NumPy Hardware ESP8266, Arduino, Motor Drivers, Sensors, Relay Systems Tools Jupyter Notebook, VS Code What I’m Building 🌡️ Temperature & Humidity Monitor A real-time IoT sensor dashboard built with Arduino and a web interface.
🌐 This Blog Built with Hugo + PaperMod, hosted free on GitHub Pages.
More coming soon…
